name: Riscent Appointment Setter — LLM/Voice tool schema
description: Drop-in function-calling tools for a text or voice LLM (e.g. paired with IB365) to read, write, and edit 30-minute appointments. Low-latency JSON over HTTPS. All calls require the header 'Authorization: Bearer <APPT_API_KEY>' (or 'x-api-key: <APPT_API_KEY>'). Times are ISO-8601 instants; slots are 30 minutes, weekdays, morning/afternoon/evening Pacific.

tools.name: find_open_slots
tools.description: List the real open 30-minute slots for a date. Call this before booking so you offer a time that is actually free.

tools.name: list_appointments
tools.description: Look up existing appointments by phone and/or date window. Use to check what a caller already has before creating, rescheduling, or cancelling.

phone.description: Caller phone (any format; server normalizes to E.164).

tools.returns: { appointments: [{ id, name, phone, slot_start, slot_end, status }] }

tools.name: book_appointment
tools.description: Create a 30-minute appointment for a caller. The slot must be one returned by find_open_slots. Ryan is texted automatically. Errors: slot_taken, slot_unavailable, invalid_phone, name_required.

tools.name: reschedule_appointment
tools.description: Move an existing appointment to a new open slot. Get the id from list_appointments and the new slot from find_open_slots.

tools.name: cancel_appointment
tools.description: Cancel an appointment by id (frees the slot). Get the id from list_appointments.

notes: Latency: direct Postgres, no per-turn model calls — safe inside a voice turn.
This trusted agent surface has no consumer OTP and no scarcity narrowing (that is only the public /book UI).
Set APPT_API_KEY in the environment to enable; unset = locked (401).
